description: On/off valve with digital output command (open/close). Includes bad quality detection and ESTOP. Used for isolation valves, drain valves, and similar binary-position valves in single-use bioprocessing systems.
applicableTo: Binary on/off valves controlled via digital output (DO)

attributes.name: ShortName
attributes.description: Human-readable equipment name used in UNS topic path (e.g., Harvest Valve)

attributes.name: ProfileDefinition
attributes.description: URL to the SM Profile definition that this instance conforms to

attributes.name: Description
attributes.description: Free-text description of the equipment instance

IO.description: Process I/O - digital output command bound to field instrument via MQTT

attributes.name: Valve_Position_SP
attributes.description: Valve position command: true = open, false = closed

Parameters.description: Configurable parameters for operating modes and alarm enables

attributes.name: Bypass
attributes.description: Valve command is bypassed (ignored by control logic)

attributes.name: DO_Bad_Alarm_Enab
attributes.description: Enable/disable bad quality alarm on valve command output

attributes.name: Operator
attributes.description: Operator acknowledgment or manual override flag

attributes.name: ResetReq
attributes.description: Reset request flag (clear alarm or fault condition)

Alarms.description: Reference tags for Ignition alarm evaluation. Each tag's value mirrors an IO process variable that an Ignition alarm property evaluates against. Alarm active/inactive state is not published in this profile version.

attributes.name: DO_Bad_Quality
attributes.description: Reference tag evaluating to Valve_Position_SP for Ignition bad quality alarm evaluation

attributes.name: ESTOP
attributes.description: Memory tag for Ignition ESTOP alarm evaluation
